name: Mistral Vibe
prerequisites: install the Mistral Vibe CLI so the 'vibe' binary is on PATH: 'uv tool install mistral-vibe' or 'curl -LsSf https://mistral.ai/vibe/install.sh | bash'
provide a Mistral API key (MISTRAL_API_KEY env var, or let 'vibe' save it to ~/.vibe/.env on first run — from console.mistral.ai)
config file ~/.vibe/config.toml selecting a model/provider (e.g. Devstral 2 or Mistral Medium 3.5)
